text_block_list.text: One day in the lead up to the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I have planned a holiday party.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In Japan, the holidays are spent among family
and friends, or with that special someone.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Under ordinary circumstances, I would spend the
holidays with you, Trainer, but the Arima Kinen is
scheduled to take place during that time.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I have planned a party based on
existing data and materials that will emulate the
"holiday spirit."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Preparations are complete, and we can start at
any time. Shall I begin the festivities?

Without wasting a second, Mihono Bourbon kicks
off the party.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: First, I will sing a festive song as an icebreaker.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I rehearsed in my room last night. Please enjoy
"Jingle Bells."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Jingle bells, jingle bells.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Jingle all the way. Oh, what fun it is to ride...

Mihono Bourbon's monotone singing continues
for some time.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Has the ice been broken, Trainer?

The ice is thicker than a glacier now, but I can't
bring myself to say that when I see the expectant
look in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Mission complete. Now, we will move on to small
talk and meal time.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I conducted a campus-wide survey beforehand to
ensure that you would be satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I created a menu with the top ten "quintessential
festive dishes."

She starts bringing out her dishes one by one, and
soon the table is filled with an array of colorful
foods.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have prepared roast chicken, roast beef, stew,
mince pies, lasagna...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Wreath salad, canapés, creamy pasta, and a
chocolate log for dessert.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have also prepared a menu of foods to be
delivered as a contingency plan.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Now, you may "dig in," as they say.

This is way too much, but Mihono Bourbon went
through so much trouble, so I want to polish off
my plate.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I see that you have consumed everything. I hope
it was to your liking.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, you have not moved an inch since
finishing. Is something the matter?

Although the food was delicious, I'm so stuffed
that I can hardly breathe, never mind move
around.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Then my mission is complete. Moving onto the
next phase—presents.

Mihono Bourbon takes out a box that appears to
be a present.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It was unclear to me what you would want, so I
decided to prepare a very practical gift.
I open the box to find... a laundry detergent set!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I came up with the idea while researching how
new neighbors greet each other. I was split
between this and soba noodles... What do you
think?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Mission complete. Present allocation successful.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Incidentally, I use this brand of detergent and am
confident in its cleansing efficacy.

For a while after, all of my clothes smell like
Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I will be satisfied if you like it.
I open the box to find... a hand-knit scarf!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I created this scarf using merino wool delivered
straight from New Zealand.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It has excellent heat retention, feels soft on the
skin, and also boasts great odor resistance.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to make something that would help keep
you warm during these harsh winter days.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That is excellent to hear.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Mission complete. Present allocation successful.

There's not a single frayed thread. It looks just
like a scarf you would find at a store.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. I excel at simple, repetitive
work.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My movements were so precise when I was
creating it that Nishino Flower recorded a video.

I wrap the scarf around my neck while resisting
the urge to ask to see the video.
